summary: Supplier Adapter Pattern & Aggregator (Iteration 80) - All 31 backend tests PASS (100%), Frontend fully functional with 4 supplier cards (RateHawk, TBO, Paximum, WWTatil). Updated from 3-supplier to 4-supplier system with Supplier Adapter Pattern. Base adapter implemented with specific adapters for each supplier. Aggregator supports fan-out search, capability matrix, and product coverage.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/supplier-credentials/supported returns 4 suppliers: ratehawk (3 fields), tbo (3 required + 1 optional), paximum (4 fields), wwtatil (5 fields)
TBO has optional_fields: [client_id] in addition to required fields
GET /api/supplier-aggregator/capabilities returns capability matrix with product types (hotel, flight, tour, transfer, activity)
GET /api/supplier-aggregator/coverage returns product coverage breakdown with connected/total counts
POST /api/supplier-aggregator/search performs fan-out search across connected suppliers - returns auth error with fake creds (expected)
Base adapter implemented at /app/backend/app/suppliers/adapters/base_adapter.py with unified interface
Each supplier adapter extends base: RateHawkAdapter, TBOAdapter, PaximumAdapter, WWTatilAdapter
Credentials encrypted with AES-256 (Fernet) - masked in responses
Frontend shows 4 supplier cards with correct fields and capability badges
Capability matrix table shows all 4 suppliers with hotel/flight/tour/transfer/activity checkmarks
Stats bar shows Total: 4, Connected: N, Saved: N dynamically
Product coverage summary (Hotel 0/3, Tour 0/2, Flight 0/1, Transfer 0/1, Activity 0/1)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (4 supplier cards rendered, capability matrix working, save/test/delete flow functional)

seed_data_creation: Test credentials created and cleaned up during test execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier Adapter Pattern with 4 suppliers (ratehawk, tbo, paximum, wwtatil) fully tested. Aggregator supports unified search across connected suppliers. Connection tests return FAIL with fake credentials (expected behavior - real API creds needed for PASS). Frontend Supplier Settings tab at /app/admin/platform-hardening has capability matrix and 4 supplier cards. Each adapter extends base SupplierAdapter class.

features_verified.GET_coverage: PASS - Returns product coverage with connected/total counts

features_verified.POST_save_tbo: PASS - Saves 3+1 field credentials including optional client_id
features_verified.POST_save_paximum: PASS - Saves 4-field credentials (base_url, username, password, agency_code)
features_verified.POST_test_ratehawk: PASS - Returns FAIL verdict with fake creds (expected)
features_verified.POST_test_tbo: PASS - Returns FAIL verdict with fake creds (expected)
features_verified.POST_test_paximum: PASS - Returns FAIL verdict with fake creds (expected)
features_verified.POST_test_wwtatil: PASS - Returns FAIL verdict with fake creds (expected)
features_verified.Frontend_4_Cards: PASS - RateHawk, TBO, Paximum, WWTatil cards rendered
features_verified.Frontend_Capability_Matrix: PASS - Matrix table shows all suppliers with product type checkmarks
features_verified.Frontend_Save_Flow: PASS - Credentials save, status changes to Saved
features_verified.Frontend_Test_Flow: PASS - Test Connection shows FAIL verdict with latency
features_verified.Frontend_Delete_Flow: PASS - Remove button deletes credentials, status returns to Not Connected

adapter_architecture.base_adapter: /app/backend/app/suppliers/adapters/base_adapter.py - Abstract base with search_hotels, search_tours, search_flights, search_transfers, search_activities

mocked_note: No mocked APIs. All supplier adapters make real HTTP calls. Connection tests with fake credentials return FAIL (correct behavior - real supplier credentials needed for PASS).
